CustomField.description: Manually populated on the Combined Funnel by Onboarding/Activation reps - mapped to Account in PB called: CF - Update Account Fields From Combined Funnel. 04/10/23 - Flagged to be deprecated (Sprint 5 - 2023)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The customer's comfort level with SaaS Onboarding needs.
CustomField.label: x_SaaS Customer Comfort Level
